blog_articles.title: The 2024 Guide to Video Marketing Funnels
blog_articles.content: In this comprehensive guide, we break down how to design full-funnel video marketing systems—from awareness to retention. We cover creative formats for each funnel stage, ideal video lengths, and how to map your content to measurable business outcomes. Topics include building a messaging hierarchy, planning retargeting sequences, and optimizing for different platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and LinkedIn.
blog_articles.excerpt: Design full-funnel video marketing systems that drive awareness, consideration, and conversions in 2024.

blog_articles.title: Short-form Video Marketing Playbook for D2C Brands
blog_articles.content: Direct-to-consumer brands are winning with short-form video. This playbook outlines how to structure hooks, storytelling beats, and CTAs in under 30 seconds. We share real examples, scripting frameworks, and recommendations for testing creative variations across TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Shorts.
blog_articles.excerpt: A practical playbook for D2C marketers using TikTok, Reels, and Shorts to drive sales.

blog_articles.title: How to Measure Video Marketing ROI Beyond Views
blog_articles.content: Views are a vanity metric. In this article we outline a practical framework for measuring video marketing ROI using metrics like engaged view rate, assisted conversions, and customer lifetime value. We also share how to set up tracking and experiments so your creative team and performance team speak the same language.
blog_articles.excerpt: Move beyond vanity metrics with a practical framework for video marketing ROI.

blog_articles.title: Vertical Video Marketing Trends to Watch in 2025
blog_articles.content: Vertical video has become the default format on social platforms. We explore emerging trends for 2025, including shoppable live video, UGC-style ads, and platform-specific behaviors. Learn how to adapt your creative strategy and production workflow to stay ahead.
blog_articles.excerpt: Seven vertical video trends that should shape your 2025 content roadmap.

blog_articles.title: Brand Strategy Foundations for High-Growth Startups
blog_articles.content: A clear brand strategy helps high-growth startups make faster, more consistent marketing decisions. We walk through defining your positioning, messaging pillars, and visual identity so every touchpoint feels cohesive, from your pitch deck to your product launch campaigns.
blog_articles.excerpt: Build a brand strategy that scales with your startup.

blog_articles.title: When Is It Time to Refresh Your Brand Identity?
blog_articles.content: Brand refreshes are powerful but resource-intensive. In this article, we outline common signals that it’s time to revisit your brand identity, from misaligned visual assets to internal confusion. We also share a phased approach to updating your brand without pausing growth.
blog_articles.excerpt: Five signals that your brand identity needs a refresh and how to approach it.

blog_articles.title: Video Production Basics for First-Time Marketers
blog_articles.content: If you’re planning your first video production, this guide explains terminology, typical timelines, and what to expect at each phase—from discovery to delivery. We also share tips for keeping projects on budget and on schedule.
blog_articles.excerpt: Everything you need to know before commissioning your first video project.

blog_articles.title: How to Build a One-Month Social Content Calendar in One Afternoon
blog_articles.content: A lightweight content calendar keeps your social media consistent without feeling rigid. We share templates and a simple prioritization method so you can plan four weeks of posts—with room for timely content and experiments.
blog_articles.excerpt: Use our simple framework to plan four weeks of social content in a few hours.

blog_articles.title: Turning Customer Stories into High-Performing Video Ads
blog_articles.content: User-generated content and customer testimonials can become some of your best-performing video ads. Learn how to source stories, structure interview questions, and edit for authenticity without sacrificing clarity.
blog_articles.excerpt: Transform real customer stories into scalable, high-performing video ads.

blog_articles.title: Brand Strategy for In-House Marketing Teams
blog_articles.content: In-house teams often juggle acquisition campaigns, lifecycle, and brand initiatives simultaneously. This article covers how to operationalize your brand strategy so everyone—from performance marketers to designers—can execute consistently.
blog_articles.excerpt: Operationalize your brand strategy so every campaign feels on-brand.

blog_articles.title: Email vs. Video: Where to Invest Your Next $5,000
blog_articles.content: Both email and video can drive revenue—but their strengths differ. We compare typical performance benchmarks, production costs, and compounding effects so you can decide where to invest your next test budget.
blog_articles.excerpt: Compare email and video channels to decide where to run your next test.

blog_articles.title: Planning a Product Launch Campaign in 30 Days
blog_articles.content: With the right process, a 30-day runway is enough to ship a cohesive launch campaign. We outline milestones for creative, media planning, and stakeholder alignment, plus sample timelines for startups and established brands.
blog_articles.excerpt: A 30-day roadmap for planning and producing a product launch campaign.

case_studies.title: GlowUp Cosmetics: UGC Launch for a New Product Line
case_studies.summary: A scrappy-but-polished launch campaign combining UGC-style videos and product close-ups for a cosmetics brand.
case_studies.detailed_story: GlowUp Cosmetics came to us ahead of their summer launch with an aggressive ROAS goal. We developed a set of short, vertical launch videos featuring creators unboxing and using the products, backed by tight product shots and overlays. The campaign rolled out across TikTok and Instagram with rapid creative iteration.

case_studies.title: Evertrail Gear: E-commerce Refresh with Story-Driven Video
case_studies.summary: We repositioned an outdoor gear brand with cinematic product launch videos and updated photography.
case_studies.detailed_story: Evertrail Gear was seeing stagnating engagement on their product pages and social channels. We produced a 60-second product launch video and supporting social cutdowns focused on real use in the wild. Combined with refreshed photography, the campaign revitalized their digital storefront.

case_studies.title: Nova Gadgets: Launching a Flagship Device with Social-First Video
case_studies.summary: A social-first product launch for a new flagship device, optimized for performance across paid and organic.
case_studies.detailed_story: Nova Gadgets needed a hero video that could flex across channels. We created a 60-second product launch film plus multiple 15-second cutdowns for social. Messaging emphasized real-world benefits and quick feature demos. Aggressive A/B testing helped us quickly hone in on top performers.

case_studies.title: Flowcast: Reducing SaaS Onboarding Churn with Explainer Video
case_studies.summary: A clear onboarding explainer series that reduced early-stage churn for a B2B SaaS product.
case_studies.detailed_story: Flowcast’s customers were dropping off during onboarding. We designed a series of short explainer videos that walk through key workflows in under two minutes each, dramatically improving activation metrics.

case_studies.title: Northline Logistics: Thought Leadership Video Series
case_studies.summary: A modular thought leadership video series that fueled a year’s worth of content.
case_studies.detailed_story: We helped Northline Logistics turn their in-house experts into on-camera talent. The result: a library of snackable clips for LinkedIn and email, supported by a hero narrative film for their website.

case_studies.title: BrightFuture: Non-Profit Awareness Campaign
case_studies.summary: An emotionally resonant brand film and social cutdowns driving donations and volunteer signups.
case_studies.detailed_story: BrightFuture needed to communicate complex impact stories in an accessible way. We produced a core brand film and multiple short social edits tailored for specific donor segments.

case_studies.title: Urban Brew: Launching a New Ready-to-Drink Coffee
case_studies.summary: A nimble video and photography package to launch a new RTD coffee into retail and DTC.
case_studies.detailed_story: We combined motion and stills into a unified launch toolkit, giving Urban Brew content for retail sell-in, social ads, and their ecommerce site—all produced in a single shoot.

case_studies.title: Linea Apparel: Elevating E-commerce with Motion Lookbooks
case_studies.summary: Motion-first lookbooks that increased time-on-site and add-to-bag rate for a fashion retailer.
case_studies.detailed_story: Static images weren’t enough for Linea Apparel’s latest collection. We created motion lookbooks, looping product clips, and vertical try-on videos, all tailored for PDPs and social placements.

case_studies.title: Syncly: Launching a New Collaboration Feature
case_studies.summary: A product launch video that clearly communicated a complex collaboration workflow.
case_studies.detailed_story: For Syncly’s feature launch, we focused on clear storytelling and UI-driven motion graphics, supported by testimonial snippets from beta customers.

case_studies.title: DesignForward: Capturing a Flagship Conference
case_studies.summary: Multi-cam event coverage repurposed into a year’s worth of content.
case_studies.detailed_story: We covered keynotes, panels, and attendee experiences, then cut the footage into highlight reels, talk recaps, and social snippets.
